title: Almond Galette
description: A delicious pastry dessert featuring a flaky crust, a sweet almond filling, and a hint of Tunisian spices.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch. Transfer to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the sliced almonds, confectioners' sugar, and Tunisian spices.
In a separate bowl, mix together the granulated sugar and beaten egg.
Spread the sugar-egg mixture evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top with the almond mixture, spreading it out to cover the entire surface.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little water and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Dust with confectioners' sugar and serve warm
